items.title: Representation Learning: A Review (Bengio et al.)
items.author: Yoshua Bengio, Aaron Courville, Pascal Vincent
items.note: Foundational survey on learning useful representations — context for why SSL pretext tasks exist.

items.title: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers (Devlin et al., 2018)
items.author: Jacob Devlin et al.
items.note: Canonical masked language modeling self-supervision for contextual text embeddings.

items.title: A Simple Framework for Contrastive Learning of Visual Representations — SimCLR (Chen et al., 2020)
items.author: Ting Chen et al.
items.note: Widely cited contrastive self-supervised vision pretraining with augmented views as pseudo-labels.
